Events Predict Log Fight Log AI Judge Random Page Support on Patreon
The website has received a slight makeover. Mostly at the backend, taking the full site rendering time from about 8 hours to about 3 seconds.
A few positive changes for the visitor too:
  • The graphs on fighter pages now fit the mobile screen and do not mess with scrolling.
  • The roster tables now include a few more columns of data.
  • I futzed around with the fonts a bit - is this too ugly? I don't know.
  • The whole thing should be quicker to load.
    • Any thoughts? Questions? Comments? Send via electronic mail.
    With the first four weeks of the prediction game a resounding success, week five is here - UFC Fight Night: Sterling vs. Zalal. Make your picks →

    UFC Fight Night: Burns vs. Malott
    Next Event
